title: refund — authorization policies
description: Two policies, one per owned entity. Segregation of duties is the load-bearing invariant — approve/reject/force-fail refuse when the actor is the initiator (per SOX §404). Customer path scoped by `refund.enforce_customer_scope` middleware; admin path opens to finance + admin + owner roles. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the permission check; scope narrowing runs via the ResolveScope middleware (tenant context; no branch scoping — refunds are tenant-wide by design).

abilities.scope: finance + admin + owner + support + customer (own refund only — refund.initiated_by_user_id == auth()->id() OR refund.customer_id == auth()->id())
finance + admin + owner. Customer path uses refunds.request (POST /refunds/mine) — segregated permission to allow different consent flows.

authenticated tenant users. Requires `refund_customer_self_service` entitlement. Customer-allowed reasons only (customer_requested / product_not_received / product_unacceptable / subscription_cancelled).
finance + admin + owner. REFUSES when refund.initiated_by_user_id == auth()->id() (segregation of duties per SOX §404 — returns REFUND_SELF_APPROVAL_REFUSED).
finance + admin + owner. Same segregation of duties as approve — cannot reject own request.
customer (own refund only) + admin + owner + finance. Only when status IN ('awaiting_approval', 'approved'). Refused once dispatch begins.
admin + owner only. Escape hatch for stuck provider_error refunds after manual provider-side investigation.
finance + admin + owner + support. Confidential financial fields (amount_cents, currency, provider_fee_reversal_cents) are redacted for readers without this permission.
Inherit from parent refund. If viewer can see the parent refund, they can see its lines.

Inherit from parent refund's create permission. Only allowed when parent refund.status IN ('pending', 'awaiting_approval', 'approved'). Requires `refund_partial` or `refund_prorated` entitlement based on parent refund_type.
DENY ALL. Refund lines are IMMUTABLE at creation — corrections require cancelling the parent refund + creating a new one.
DENY ALL. Refund lines cascade via FK on parent delete only; direct delete refused.
